adminPage.noChurch: No churches found.  Please search for a different name.
adminPage.noUsers: No users found. Please search for a different name or email.
adminPage.noteFour: Comparable software is ProPresenter.  It's $399 for a site license.  I made assumptions that the average church installs the software on 3 computers and divided our total installs by 3 to get the number of churches.  I also made the assumption that churches will upgrade to a newer version every 5 years on average.  So $399 / 5 years / 3 computers = $26.60 annual cost per computer.  If we can quantify these assumptions we should update this number.
adminPage.noteOne: Comparable software is Breeze.  They charge $72/mo or $864/year.
adminPage.noteThree: Comparable content is Orange.  They charge $1023/year for churches with 26-50 viewers for 252 Basic.
adminPage.noteTwo: Comparable software is SubSplash.  They start at $99/mo or $1200/year.  This does not include the cut they take on donations.
adminPage.subtitle: Manage server-wide settings and churches
adminPage.valueNotes: Notes on How Values are Calculated

helpDialog.addBody: Click Add Content in the toolbar, then drag a section or element onto the page.
helpDialog.editBody: Double-click any section or element to open its settings. Click once to select and use the floating toolbar.
helpDialog.moveBody: Drag sections and elements to reorder them. Use the up/down arrows on the selection toolbar for precise moves.
helpDialog.title: Page editor basics
helpDialog.undoBody: Use Ctrl+Z to undo and Ctrl+Shift+Z to redo. Open the History panel from the menu to jump to any earlier state.

historyPanel.noHistory: No history available yet. Make some changes to start tracking history.
historyPanel.title: Edit History

navStyleEdit.headerSubtitle: Match the navigation to your church's branding
navStyleEdit.solidSectionDesc: Used on most pages. Each color is optional — leave Override off to keep the site's current rendering.
navStyleEdit.transparentSectionDesc: Used when the nav floats over a hero image. Leave Override off to auto-match the hero's text color.

pageLink.confirmDelete: Are you sure you wish to permanently delete this page?
pageLink.confirmDuplicate: Are you sure you wish to make a copy of this page and all of it's contents?
pageLink.urlHelper: ex: /camper-registration  (**Make sure to check before saving)

pagesPage.confirmConvert: Would you like to convert this auto-generated page to a custom page?
pagesPage.description: Below is a list of custom and auto-generated pages. You can add new pages, edit existing ones, or convert auto-generated pages to custom pages.
pagesPage.desktopOnly: Page editor is only available in desktop mode
pagesPage.getStarted: Get started by adding your first page.
pagesPage.showLoginTooltip: Show login button in the navigation bar
pagesPage.subtitle: Manage your website pages, content, and navigation

paletteEdit.applySuggested: Click any palette to apply it instantly
paletteEdit.headerSubtitle: Customize your website's color scheme. For mobile app, member portal, and kiosk colors, go to Settings > App Theme.
paletteEdit.previewWorkTogether: Preview how your colors work together

pickColors.opacityHelper: The opacity of black gradient layer on top of the image. Max value: 1

rowMobileSizes.mobileWidthsHelper: Mobile widths do not need to add up to 12. Values that add up to 24 will span two rows.

section.confirmDelete: Are you sure you wish to permanently delete this section?

sectionEdit.convertToBlockPrompt: Are you sure you wish to copy this section and all of it's contents to a block?

spacingScaleEdit.dramaticSectionDesc: Uses xxl ({value}px) vertical padding for maximum impact
spacingScaleEdit.heroSectionDesc: Uses xl ({xl}px) vertical and lg ({lg}px) horizontal padding
spacingScaleEdit.iconRowDesc: Icons use xs ({value}px) gap between them
spacingScaleEdit.practicalExamplesDesc: See how your spacing values affect real UI elements

styleEdit.stylesHelper: Use these fields to customize the style of a single element. For sitewide changes use the site appearance editor.

stylesAnimations.animationsDesc: Effect for when element is shown.
